description_long: This barbecue grill features an oval, egg-shaped main body with a matte black finish and a central metallic band encircling its midsection. The grill stands on three sturdy, angled legs that provide stability, with a rectangular ash or charcoal collection box positioned beneath the main chamber. Two horizontal handles extend from either side, likely for maneuvering or lifting the lid, and a prominent handle is mounted on top of the domed lid. A small circular vent or temperature gauge is visible on the upper front, and a vertical rod or vent lever is present on the lid. The grill is equipped with two side shelves or tables, one on each side, for food preparation or utensil placement. The overall design suggests a robust, outdoor-friendly appliance suitable for parks, backyards, or communal urban spaces.
description: A robust, egg-shaped barbecue grill with a domed lid, side shelves, and sturdy tripod legs, finished in matte black with metallic accents. It features handles, a vent or gauge, and a lower ash collection box.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid with a top handle, central vent or gauge, side handles, and both side shelves clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the vertical vent lever on the lid, the side handle, and the sturdy tripod leg arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back handle, both side shelves, and the ash collection box beneath the grill.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side handle, vent lever, and the alignment of the legs and ash box.
